dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to delete all processing logs? This cannot be undone.

config.title: Configuration
config.notConnectedHint: Connect above to populate tag dropdowns
config.paperlessNotConfigured: Paperless URL and Token must be configured
config.processTagHint: Documents with this tag will be processed
config.ocrPostProcessHint: Fix OCR errors with LLM after extraction
config.tagBlacklistHint: Comma-separated tag names the LLM must not assign
config.forceOcrTagHint: Tag to force vision OCR on a document
config.forceOcrFixTagHint: Tag to force OCR + LLM fix on a document
config.apiKeyHint: Required for OpenAI; also used for hosted/proxied Ollama
config.visionOcrHint: Use a vision model to OCR document images
config.fallbackOcrHint: Use local Tesseract OCR if vision model fails
config.clearStateConfirm: Clear stuck processing state? Only do this if processing was interrupted.
config.llmTimeoutHint: Maximum wait time for LLM/vision responses (30–3600 s). Increase for slow models.
config.llmTimeoutVisionHint: Timeout for vision/OCR requests (30–3600 s). Leave at 600 if unsure.
config.modularSectionHint: Customize the Paperless tag names that trigger each processing step. Leave blank to use the default.
config.modularTagProcessHint: Triggers all 7 steps (OCR → OCR fix → title → correspondent → type → tags → fields). Default: ai-process
config.modularTagOcrHint: Triggers vision OCR only (no LLM fix). Default: ai-ocr
config.modularTagOcrFixHint: Triggers LLM OCR-fix on existing content only (no vision re-OCR). Default: ai-ocr-fix
config.modularTagTitleHint: Triggers title generation only. Default: ai-title
config.modularTagCorrespondentHint: Triggers correspondent detection only. Default: ai-correspondent
config.modularTagDocumentTypeHint: Triggers document type detection only. Default: ai-document-type
config.modularTagTagsHint: Triggers tag classification only (respects blacklist). Default: ai-tags
config.modularTagFieldsHint: Triggers custom field extraction only. Default: ai-fields
config.modularProcessedTagHint: Added to document after successful modular processing. Falls back to 'Processed Tag' if blank.
config.logLevelHint: Controls verbosity of the System Logs. DEBUG shows full pipeline detail.
config.authEnabledHint: When enabled, users must sign in with their Paperless-ngx credentials
config.authEnabledWarning: You will be redirected to the login page immediately after saving.
config.authRequiresPaperless: Paperless URL must be configured before enabling authentication.

login.title: Sign In
login.paperlessNotConfigured: Paperless is not configured. Please set the Paperless URL in settings first.
login.mfaHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app

prompts.title: Prompt Manager
prompts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
prompts.confirmLoadSamples: This will reset all sample prompts to their defaults. Custom prompts are not affected.

chat.title: Document Chat
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about your documents
chat.emptyState: Select a document to start chatting
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question about the document...
chat.documentLoaded: Document loaded: "{{title}}". You can now ask me questions about this document.
chat.errorResponse: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your request.
chat.searchPlaceholder: Search documents by title or content...
chat.previewHint: Simulate AI processing without modifying Paperless
